tasks.subject: Phase 0: SPIKE background-while-locked
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Verdict — does the native mint loop keep posting to /collect while screen LOCKED, via silent-audio keep-alive?
**Verify:** gh run watch → success; curl /stats collected before/after locked window. Throwaway branch spike/bg-locked, do NOT merge.
```json:metadata
{"phase":0,"deRisks":"U-BG","verifyCommand":"gh run watch <id> --exit-status; curl /stats"}
```

tasks.subject: Phase 1: Config surface + persistence
tasks.description:
**Goal:** editable+persisted sitekey/interval/oracle; EL sitekey a default preset.
**Verify:** npm test -- src/config; CI green; on-device persist + U-SITE probe.
```json:metadata
{"phase":1,"deRisks":"U-SITE","verifyCommand":"npm test -- src/config"}
```

tasks.subject: Phase 2: Pure controller library (TS, tested)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** jitter/backoff/adaptive pure + unit-tested; canonical brain + parity fixtures.
**Verify:** npm test -- src/controller → PASS.
```json:metadata
{"phase":2,"verifyCommand":"npm test -- src/controller"}
```

tasks.subject: Phase 3: Native MintEngine + live updateConfig
tasks.description:
**Goal:** native config-driven loop + updateConfig (no restart); Swift mirrors TS controller, parity-gated.
**Verify:** gh run watch → success; device cadence change; PARITY OK.
```json:metadata
{"phase":3,"verifyCommand":"gh run watch <id> --exit-status"}
```

tasks.subject: Phase 4: Adaptive rate from oracle /stats
tasks.description:
**Goal:** engine polls /stats, rate-matches production to registration burn, natively.
**Verify:** device + desktop /next drain; dashboard reason starved↔waste↔steady.
```json:metadata
{"phase":4,"deRisks":"U-RATE(prod)","verifyCommand":"device /stats drain probe"}
```

tasks.subject: Phase 5: Background execution (per Phase 0 verdict)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** keep minting screen-off via the path Phase 0 proved (audio-keepalive | foreground-resilient).
**Verify:** 30min locked /stats measurement.
```json:metadata
{"phase":5,"deRisks":"U-BG","verifyCommand":"30min locked measurement"}
```

tasks.subject: Phase 6: Resilience — offline queue + auto-restart
tasks.description:
**Goal:** failures don't stop the farm or drop tokens (queue<max_age_s, auto-restart, backoff).
**Verify:** device oracle kill/restart → queue grows+backoff, then flush.
```json:metadata
{"phase":6,"verifyCommand":"device oracle kill/restart probe"}
```

tasks.subject: Phase 7: Challenge/quota self-tuning
tasks.description:
**Goal:** detect visible-challenge → AIMD ceiling; farm finds its own max rate. FIRST log captcha.onEvent payloads (don't invent event strings).
**Verify:** drive to challenge → auto-backoff + persisted ceiling.
```json:metadata
{"phase":7,"deRisks":"U-RATE","verifyCommand":"device challenge-event probe"}
```

tasks.subject: Phase 8: Multi-sitekey fleet rotation
tasks.description:
**Goal:** list of {sitekey,oracleUrl,weight}, weighted round-robin, per-sitekey stats; single-key migrates.
**Verify:** two targets → both oracles at configured ratio.
```json:metadata
{"phase":8,"verifyCommand":"two-target ratio probe"}
```

tasks.subject: Phase 9: Battery/thermal adaptive
tasks.description:
**Goal:** throttle on hot/low-battery/unplugged; composes with adaptive (take MAX delay).
**Verify:** device load or simulated state → throttle + badge.
```json:metadata
{"phase":9,"verifyCommand":"device thermal/battery probe"}
```

tasks.subject: Phase 10: Observability dashboard
tasks.description:
**Goal:** live cockpit (rate/success%/pool/per-sitekey/challenge/thermal/reason/bg-state) + filtered log.
**Verify:** npm test (UI logic) + device visual.
```json:metadata
{"phase":10,"verifyCommand":"npm test + device visual"}
```

tasks.subject: Phase 11: Multi-device fleet coordination
tasks.description:
**Goal:** N phones share one oracle, coordinate via /stats suggested_interval_ms; oracle change additive.
**Verify:** two devices + one oracle → aggregate holds target as you add/remove a device.
```json:metadata
{"phase":11,"verifyCommand":"two-device aggregate probe"}
```
